name: generate_document
description: Legacy compatibility router: dispatches to generate_docx, generate_xlsx, or ppt_generate based on the `format` field. Prefer Python-based Office workflows via run_shell + doc-script-editor, or call format-specific tools directly. Use this tool only as a last resort for backward compatibility.

format.description: The document format to generate. Determines which specialized tool handles the request.

path.description: Output file path (absolute or relative to a source directory). Must be within a registered source directory.

content.description: Structured content for the document. Schema depends on the format chosen — see generate_docx, generate_xlsx, or ppt_generate for details.
